mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (employee_no, email, password_hash, name, department, position, role) VALUES (#{employeeNo}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{department}, #{position}, 'USER')
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE email = #{email})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE employee_no = #{employeeNo})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET login_fail_count = #{count}, locked_until = #{lockedUntil}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET login_fail_count = 0, locked_until = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows WHERE following_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET bio = #{bio}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET department = #{department}, position = #{position}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY name LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
